name: side_glyph_left_range

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.16 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃行左小書き］ ... ［＃行左小書き終わり］ is the left-side counterpart of the bare-range small script glyph; it renders to the inline aozora-koshogaki-left span, mirroring the forward-reference 「X」は行左小書き leaf. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: X［＃行左小書き］YZ［＃行左小書き終わり］W
